name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Houston's Western Union Money Order Only at 5802 Memorial Dr provides 24-hour money order and money transfer services every Saturday.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 5802 Memorial Dr in Houston, TX operates 24 hours on Saturdays, providing round-the-clock access to money order services for the local community. This standalone location serves Houston residents and visitors who need reliable money transfer solutions outside traditional banking hours. The Memorial Drive location in Houston is easily accessible for customers throughout the surrounding area.

At this Houston location, you can send money orders domestically and internationally with direct support available at +1 713-861-2421. The staff can help you complete transactions quickly and answer questions about available money transfer options. Whether you're sending funds across Texas or nationally, this Western Union Money Order Only location provides dedicated money transfer service.

If you're in Houston and need a money order outside traditional banking hours, bring a valid government-issued ID and your payment method. This 24-hour Saturday operation makes it convenient for those with non-standard schedules or weekend banking needs. Western Union Money Order Only offers a straightforward alternative to banks for transferring funds reliably.
pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ locations in Houston alone, providing high accessibility
24/7 online transaction initiation with flexible in-store payment based on local agent hours
Multilingual support in 6 languages including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Real-time transaction tracking and monitoring capabilities for sent funds
Multiple service options including money orders, wire transfers, bill payments, and mobile top-ups
Western Union Rewards program offering benefits to repeat customers
Partner locations at major retailers (Walmart, Walgreens, Kroger, Circle K) for convenient access
cons: Significant service variability by location—some agents offer money orders only (e.g., Circle K #0713), limiting options
Maximum payout limits at certain locations capped at $300 (multiple Walgreens and some other agents), creating constraints for larger transfers
Website shows current processing delays for payments to Orange Wallet in Cameroon, indicating service reliability issues
Agent-based model means service quality and hours depend on partner location rather than Western Union's direct control
No indication of competitive fee structure or pricing transparency on location page
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing cash access without a traditional bank account
Immigrants and expatriates sending remittances to family internationally
Customers in multilingual communities seeking non-English language support for money services
People needing convenient retail-location money orders and quick cash transfers
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked individuals, immigrants sending remittances, and anyone needing accessible cash transfer services through retail locations. The main caveat is that services and limits vary significantly by agent location—some restrict offerings to money orders only, and several cap cash payouts at $300, so customers should verify capabilities at their nearest location before relying on Western Union for specific transaction amounts.
services: International and domestic money transfers with cash pickup
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 5802 Memorial Dr, Houston, TX offers 24-hour money order services on Saturdays.
